details: Paper text confirms compound 4e mp 76 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules31040706 present in file; quote is verbatim.
Paper text confirms compound 6 (3-Acetyl-4,6-diamino-... naphthyridin-5(6H)-one) mp 288-290 °C; PMC12986497 paper folder present; quote verbatim though uses code '6' rather than full name.
Paper text confirms 5-hydroxy-3-phenyl-1H-pyrazole-1-carbothioamide m.p:160 °C; DOI 10.1016/j.jobcr.2024.01.008 present; quote verbatim but doesn't include compound name (paper introduces it later).
Paper confirms compound 26b-1 ((4R,6R)-...-triisopropylbenzenesulfonate) mp 55-57 °C in PMC11209911; quote verbatim but omits compound name/code.
Paper text confirms 9-fluoro-6-(4-nitrobenzyl)-6H-benzo[c]chromene (5i) Mp 144 °C; DOI present; quote verbatim.
Paper text confirms Philinopgenin A (1) mp 208.5-208.5 °C in PMC3783257; quote verbatim with compound name and value.
Paper confirms anti-tosylate 10 (anti-9-(tosyloxymethyl)-tricyclo...tetraene) mp 105-105 °C in PMC6236343; quote verbatim but omits compound name/code.
Paper confirms (1SR)-...-L-phenylalanine methyl ester (4e) m.p. 128-129 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules16108815 present; quote verbatim with code 4e.

Paper confirms 3-Ethoxycarbonyl-2-benzyl isoquinolinium bromide (5a) mp 132-34°C (paper shorthand) -> row value 132-134; PMC6146463 paper present; quote verbatim. Range-expansion is allowed per criteria.
Paper confirms 16β-hydroxyaspidospermidine (6a) m.p. 55°C in PMC6236427; quote contains compound name and value.

Paper confirms carboxamide 2h (6-Methyl-N-(1S,2S,3S,5R)-(+)-Isopinocampheyl-...indeno[1,2-b]pyrrole-3-carboxamide) M.p. 225-228 °C; DOI present; evidence_quote uses ◦ (ring) instead of paper's ° causing unicode mismatch and quote omits compound code.
Paper confirms 1-(4-Benzylpiperazin-1-yl)-4-Phenylbutan-1-One (4a) mp 166°C-168°C; DOI 10.1002/cmdc.202500922 present; quote verbatim.

Paper confirms compound 6d (Methyl-2-[2-(5-benzyl-4-phenyl-4H-[1,2,4]triazol-3-thio)-acetylamino]-4-(methylthio)-butyrate) mp 89 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules15106759 present; quote verbatim with code 6d.
Paper confirms 3-(2-Furyl) 4-(2-methoxycarbonylphenylazo)-pyrazole (9a) m.p. 160°C; DOI 10.3390/81200910 present; quote verbatim but omits compound name/code.

Paper confirms compound 2b (1,3-Dimethyl-7-[2-(5-methyl-2,3-dihydro-1H-indol-1-yl)ethyl]-1H-purine-2,6(3H,7H)-dione) mp >300°C in PMC9007260; quote verbatim with name+code but value cut just before mp >300°C.
Paper confirms Methyl N-[4'-methylphenylsulphonyl-β-alaninyl]anthranilate (2d) m.p. 130°C in PMC6236356; quote verbatim but omits compound name/code.
Paper confirms N-(2,6-Dimethylpiperidylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid (31) mp 225-228 °C; DOI 10.3390/ph19020256 present; quote verbatim with name+code+value.
Paper confirms (2E,4E)-5-([1,1'-Biphenyl]-4-yl)-N-(adamantan-1-yl)penta-2,4-dienamide (17) Mp 196-198 °C; DOI present; quote verbatim with name+code but cut before value 'Mp 196-198'.
Paper confirms compound 4c (S-8-(4-(3-(5'-(Methylthio)-2,2'-bithiophen-5-ylthio)propyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-1-yl)octyl thioacetate) mp 84-86 °C; DOI present; quote verbatim with code.
Paper confirms 1,7-Dithio-4,10,13-trioxocyclopentadecane (B3) Melting point 63-64 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules16108670 present; quote verbatim with name+code+value.

Section 4.1.22 of paper names compound 2c (6-Methyl-1-(4-Methylbenzyl)-N-(homopiperidin-1-yl)-...-3-carbohydrazide) M.p. 118-120 °C; quote uses ◦ instead of ° (unicode mismatch) and refers to body-text typo '1c'; the 2c assignment is correct from section heading.
Paper confirms Methyl 2-benzamido-2-(benzylamino)acetate (9) m.p. 104-106 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules15129354 present; quote verbatim with name+code+value.
Paper confirms tosylhydrazone of 9-formyl-tricyclo[6.2.1.0^2,7]undeca-2,4,6,9-tetraene m.p. 134-135 °C in PMC6236343; quote verbatim but omits compound name/code.

Paper confirms compound 4f (Ethyl rac-(2'R,3aS,4'S,6R,9aR)-1,1',3-trimethyl-2,2'',7-trioxo-3a,9a-diphenyl-...-4'-carboxylate) mp 222-225 °C; DOI 10.3390/ijms242216359 present; quote verbatim with code 4f.
Paper confirms (1R)-...-L-methionine methyl ester (4h) m.p. 98-100 °C; DOI 10.3390/molecules16108815 present; quote verbatim with code 4h.
